title: 3 takeaways from the Revolution’s 1-1 draw vs. Lionel Messi and Inter Miami

title: Alex Cora firing reaction: What players writers, fans, and others are saying about Red Sox’ shocking move
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Red Sox "This is a typical Red Sox move.
They are known for scapegoating.
" Alex Cora and several members of his staff were let go on Saturday evening.
